remarks: Welcome to a Garden Paradise. Canaan Close is admired as the most beautifully landscaped Townhouse complex in New Canaan. With views and the "music" of the 5 mile river, heated pool retreat, fountain gardens and even a meandering River Walk, this is indeed one of New Canaan's most sought-after communities.  This sophisticated 3 bedroom 3 bath end unit is bathed in sunlight and lives like a single family home. Entertaining and relaxing is a delight in your large light-filled living room and doors opening to your private balcony. What a better way to enjoy your coffee & croissants with views of the 5 mile river!  Dine in your sophisticated dining room with crown molding or in your updated Decorator kitchen with a charming window seat and table. Your first floor spacious sitting room is also a first floor bedroom with bath. Great feature for family or guests! Upstairs there is an impressive balcony with dining and seating areas, two additional bedrooms -a beautiful Primary bedroom with large closets and updated bath. The lower level has a large family room and reading alcove, both opening to a lovely patio surrounded by  lush gardens.  Enjoy a short stroll to New Canaan's vibrant village center with its fine & fun restaurants, boutique shopping, library, parks, and train station.  New Canaan's award winning schools are each close by. Canaan Close is a treasure in the Heart of New Canaan
